case_title: SPECK CAB COMPANY DBA VETERANS CAB COMPANY VS BUTLER, MARY LOUISE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER, MARY LOUISE
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPECK CAB COMPANY DBA VETERANS CAB COMPANY HEARING SET FOR APR-07-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPECK CAB COMPANY DBA VETERANS CAB COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUTLER, MARY LOUISE $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $52.00, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT GRANTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,257.16 FILED BY SPECK CAB COMPANY DBA VETERANS CAB COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER, MARY LOUISE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2003 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPECK CAB COMPANY DBA VETERANS CAB COMPANY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BUTLER, MARY LOUISE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFT CONTINUANCE REQUEST, FILED. $10 FEE PAID. TO BE SIGNED BY COMM.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-03-2003, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JAN-29-2003 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-07-2003, GRANTED
